name: unduck
description: Jump from DuckDuckGo to Google with one click.

scripts.build:firefox: web-ext build --overwrite-dest --ignore-files tests scripts .gsd .agents .planning .bg-shell AGENTS.md skills-lock.json package.json package-lock.json url-builder.js store-assets graphics README.md PRIVACY.md .gitignore
scripts.build:chrome: zip -j unduck-chrome.zip manifest.json content.js content.css && zip unduck-chrome.zip icons/icon16.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png
